case_title: RICHIN TRADING INC. VS. LIEN FAT, LLC

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR ZHENYUN ZHANG (SALES REPRESENTATIVE) FILED BY PETITIONER RICHIN TRADING INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHIN TRADING INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIEN FAT, LLC $2,984.40 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,069.40, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) **PROOF OF SERVICE RECEIVED IN OFFICE ON SEP-19-2011 FOR ORIGINAL COURT DATE OF OCT-14-2011** SERVED SEP-15-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIEN FAT, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,984.40 FILED BY RICHIN TRADING INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LIEN FAT, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-18-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APPEARED AND STATED HE HAD NOT SERVED THE DEFENDANT AND REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE. DEFENDANT ARRIVED AFTER PLAINTIFF LEFT AND HAD A COPY OF THE CLAIM, STATING SHE WAS INDEED SERVED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
